name: Duncan Craib
background: Mr. Craib is a highly experienced mining executive with over 20 years’ experience in the mining industry. He was previously Finance Director of Swakop Uranium (Pty) Ltd and was involved in the US$2.5 billion development of the Husab Uranium Project in Namibia.

companies.name: Boss Energy Limited
companies.title_or_role: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer
